title: Azzy's Armaments
description: A Texture Pack centered around retexturing parts of the GUI and a few Modded Weapons from Arsenal, Amarite, etc.
body:
## Retextures

### Minecraft
- Hotbar
- Hearts
- Hunger _(appleskin support)_
- Armor Points
- Removed enchant glint

### Amarite
- Longsword
- Amarite Shard
- Pocket Mirror

### Arsenal 
- Scythe
- Anchorblade

## Purpose

I've found that my style recently has taken a pretty huge change. not necessarily for the better or for the worse, but i'm far happier with it and have decided to make a texture pack for those who feel the same <3
